entries.name: quality
entries.description: A dependent entity that inheres in a bearer by virtue of how the bearer is related to other entities

entries.name: mobility
entries.description: A quality of inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's disposition to move freely.

entries.name: speed
entries.description: A physical quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's scalar absolute value of the rate of change of the bearer's position.

entries.name: age
entries.description: A time quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of how long the bearer has existed.

entries.name: color
entries.description: A composite chromatic quality composed of hue, saturation and intensity parts.

entries.name: color hue
entries.description: A chromatic scalar-circular quality inhering in an object that manifests in an observer by virtue of the dominant wavelength of the visible light; may be subject to fiat divisions, typically into 7 or 8 spectra.

entries.name: color brightness
entries.description: A scalar optical property that is the intensity, value or amount of perceived light.

entries.name: color saturation
entries.description: A scalar chromatic property that is the degree of purity of perceived light.

entries.name: fluorescence
entries.description: A luminous flux quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's emitting longer wavelength light following the absorption of shorter wavelength radiation; fluorescence is common with aromatic compounds with several rings joined together.

entries.name: color pattern
entries.description: A chromatic property that is the relative position of different hues or degrees of saturation.

entries.name: compatibility
entries.description: A quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's disposition to harmonious coexistence.

entries.name: composition
entries.description: A single physical entity inhering in an bearer by virtue of the bearer's quantities or relative ratios of subparts.

entries.name: concentration of
entries.description: A quality inhering in a substance by virtue of the amount of the bearer's there is mixed with another substance.

entries.name: consistency
entries.description: A physical quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's density, firmness, or viscosity.

entries.name: direction
entries.description: A physical quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's orientation in space.

entries.name: distance
entries.description: A quality that is the extent of space between two entities.

entries.name: flavor
entries.description: A quality of a physical entity inhering in a bearer by virtue of whether the bearer's molecules are being perceived by a taste and odorant receptors.

entries.name: frequency
entries.description: A physical quality which inheres in a bearer by virtue of the number of the bearer's repetitive actions in a particular time.

entries.name: biological sex
entries.description: An organismal quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's ability to undergo sexual reproduction in order to differentiate the individuals or types involved.

entries.name: hardness
entries.description: A physical quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's resistance to pressure, being broken, or pierced

entries.name: intensity
entries.description: A quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's possessing or displaying a distinctive feature in type or degree or effect or force.

entries.name: life span
entries.description: A time quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's expected maximum age.

entries.name: morphology
entries.description: A quality of a single physical entity inhering in the bearer by virtue of the bearer's size or shape or structure.

entries.name: shape
entries.description: A morphological quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's ratios of distances between its features (points, edges, surfaces and also holes etc).

entries.name: trophic quality
entries.description: An organismal quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's disposition to synthesize a particular organic compound required for its growth.

entries.name: occurrence
entries.description: A quality of a single process inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's occurrence.

entries.name: odor
entries.description: A physical quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's molecules being are aerially dispersed and perceived by an odorant receptor.

entries.name: spatial pattern
entries.description: A spatial quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's exhibiting repetition of placement of its parts.

entries.name: sleep pattern
entries.description: A sleep quality defined by the mathematic properties of the relative time frames of the sleep cycle.

entries.name: pilosity
entries.description: A texture quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's having hair or bristles.

entries.name: qualitative
entries.description: A quality of an entity that is descriptive or observational, typically not represented numerically.

entries.name: deviation (from_normal)
entries.description: A quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the whether the bearer differs from normal or average.

entries.name: amount
entries.description: The number of entities of this type that are part of the whole organism.

entries.name: response to
entries.description: A quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the whether the bearer's disposition to react to a stimulus or an agent.

entries.name: rhythm quality
entries.description: A quality of a single process inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's movement or variation characterized by the regular recurrence or alternation of different quantities or conditions.

entries.name: amplitude
entries.description: A physical quality of a process inhering in a bearer by virtue of the size of the bearer's maximum displacement from the 'normal' position, when periodic motion is taking place.

entries.name: persistence
entries.description: A rhythm quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the repetitiveness of bearer's rhythm.

entries.name: phase
entries.description: A quality that exists by virtue of being a particular point in the time of a cycle.

entries.name: sensitivity toward
entries.description: A quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's disposition to detect or perceive external stimulation.

entries.name: size
entries.description: A morphology quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's physical magnitude.

entries.name: height
entries.description: A 1-D extent quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's vertical dimension of extension.

entries.name: length
entries.description: A 1-D extent quality which is equal to the distance between two points.

entries.name: mass
entries.description: A physical quality that inheres in a bearer by virtue of the proportion of the bearer's amount of matter.

entries.name: weight
entries.description: A physical quality inhering in a bearer that has mass near a gravitational body. Important usage note: Note that this ontology has a class for a similar concept, mass (PATO:0000125). Mass and weight are not equivalent. For most use cases, the class mass is strongly preferred over weight.

entries.name: orientation
entries.description: A spatial quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's placement which is defined by the angle between the bearer and an axis, or the angle between the bearer and another object.

entries.name: closure
entries.description: A morphological quality pertaining to the degree to which an object contains an opening, aperture, orifice or vent.

entries.name: position
entries.description: A spatial quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's spatial location relative to other objects in the vicinity.

entries.name: structure
entries.description: A morphology quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's relative position, shape, arrangements and connectivity of an organism's various parts; the pattern underlying its form.

entries.name: temperature
entries.description: A physical quality of the thermal energy of a system.

entries.name: texture
entries.description: A morphologic quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's relative size, organization and distribution of its surface elements or the representation or invention of the appearance of its surface; visual and tactile surface characteristics.

entries.name: threshold
entries.description: A quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's sensitivity towards a fixed location or value where a change is observed; upper limit.

entries.name: rate
entries.description: A quality of a single process inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's occurrence per unit time.

entries.name: time
entries.description: A quality in which events occur in sequence.

entries.name: viability
entries.description: An organismal quality inhering in a bearer or a population by virtue of the bearer's disposition to survive and develop normally or the number of surviving individuals in a given population.

entries.name: balance
entries.description: A behavioral quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of having physical steadiness.

entries.name: behavioral quality
entries.description: An organismal quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's behavior aggregate of the responses or reactions or movements in a given situation.

entries.name: coordination
entries.description: A behavioral quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's having or lacking skillful and effective interaction of movement.

entries.name: discrimination
entries.description: A behavioral quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of whether the bearer's disposition to perceive differences between two or more stimuli.

entries.name: maturity
entries.description: A quality of a single physical entity which is held by a bearer when the latter exhibits a state of growth, differentiation, or development.

entries.name: fecundity
entries.description: A reproductive quality inhering in an organism or population by virtue of the bearer's potential reproductive capacity ad measured by the number of gametes.

entries.name: fertility
entries.description: A reproductive quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's initiating, sustaining, or supporting reproduction.

entries.name: brood size
entries.description: A reproductive quality inhering in the young of an animal by virtue of their number.

entries.name: female fertility
entries.description: A fertility quality inhering in a female by virtue of the bearer's disposition to initiate, sustain, or support reproduction.

entries.name: male fertility
entries.description: A fertility quality of inhering in a male by virtue of the bearer's disposition to initiate, sustain, or support reproduction.

entries.name: arrested
entries.description: A quality of a process which ends earlier than the natural end time or reference process.

entries.name: mobile
entries.description: A mobility quality of inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's disposition to move freely.

entries.name: immobile
entries.description: A mobility quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's being incapable to move freely.

entries.name: increased speed
entries.description: A speed which is relatively high.

entries.name: decreased speed
entries.description: A speed which is relatively low.

entries.name: old
entries.description: An age which is relatively high.

entries.name: young
entries.description: An age which is relatively low.

entries.name: black
entries.description: A color that lacks any hues as parts.

entries.name: blue
entries.description: A color hue with low wavelength of that portion of the visible spectrum lying between green and indigo, evoked in the human observer by radiant energy with wavelengths of approximately 420 to 490 nanometers.

entries.name: cyan
entries.description: A color consisting of green and blue hue.

entries.name: green
entries.description: A color hue with medium-low wavelength of that portion of the visible spectrum lying between yellow and blue, evoked in the human observer by radiant energy with wavelengths of approximately 490 to 570 nanometers.

entries.name: magenta
entries.description: A color consisting of red and blue hues.

entries.name: red
entries.description: A color hue with high wavelength of the long-wave end of the visible spectrum, evoked in the human observer by radiant energy with wavelengths of approximately 630 to 750 nanometers.

entries.name: white
entries.description: An achromatic color of maximum brightness; the color of objects that reflect nearly all light of all visible wavelengths.

entries.name: yellow
entries.description: A color hue with medium wavelength of that portion of the visible spectrum lying between orange and green, evoked in the human observer by radiant energy with wavelengths of approximately 570 to 590 nanometers.

entries.name: low brightness
entries.description: A color brightness which is relatively low.

entries.name: low saturation
entries.description: A color saturation which is of low purity.

entries.name: blotchy
entries.description: A color pattern inhering in a bearer by virtue of bearer's being marked with irregularly shaped spots or blots of a different hue or degree of saturation.

entries.name: irregular spatial pattern
entries.description: A spatial pattern inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's magnitude of or the relationships between its repeated parts lack consistency.

entries.name: discolored
entries.description: A color quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's being altered or spoiled in color.

entries.name: spotted
entries.description: A color pattern inhering in a bearer by virtue of bearer's being marked with a round area of different hue or degree of saturation.

entries.name: colored
entries.description: A color quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's having color.

entries.name: colorless
entries.description: A color quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's lacking color.

entries.name: compatible
entries.description: A compatibility quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's being capable of harmonious coexistence.

entries.name: incompatible
entries.description: A compatibility quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's being incapable of harmonious coexistence.

entries.name: down
entries.description: A directional quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's direction from a higher to a lower point.

entries.name: left
entries.description: A directional quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's direction that is similar to the direction of an object to the north when it faces east.

entries.name: right
entries.description: A directional quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's direction that is similar to the direction of an object to the north when it faces west.

entries.name: up
entries.description: A directional quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's direction from a lower to a higher point.

entries.name: increased distance
entries.description: A distance which is greater relative to the normal or average.

entries.name: decreased distance
entries.description: A distance which is lesser relative to the normal or average.

entries.name: increased frequency
entries.description: A frequency which is relatively high.

entries.name: decreased frequency
entries.description: A frequency which is relatively low.

entries.name: female
entries.description: A biological sex quality inhering in an individual or a population that only produces gametes that can be fertilised by male gametes.

entries.name: male
entries.description: A biological sex quality inhering in an individual or a population whose sex organs contain only male gametes.

entries.name: hard
entries.description: A hardness quality of being rigid and resistant to pressure.
